route_trace.observation: Navigated to http://localhost:7456/?scene=8edd8f65-6575-4b60-b2fa-cd3875a00721 (Prototype scene UUID). Cocos Creator v3.8.8 initialized in 24ms. After 5s wait, PrototypeBoard component was instantiated programmatically via cc.js.getClassByName('PrototypeBoard') and addComponent(). Board rendered with 8x8 colored tiles (65 draw calls, 820 triangles, 60 FPS). Canvas confirmed present and rendering at 960x640 CSS px.

Board rendered with 64 tiles in 5 tile types (coral-orange, cyan, green, warm-sand, pink). Tile nodes confirmed: tile_0_0 through tile_7_7 all present as children of Board node. BFS matching logic active. No black frame, no crash. HUD bootstrap attempted but failed silently (getComponent: Type must be non-nil x2) due to missing UITransform on programmatically-created Board node — known CL-01 issue.

3 successful matches made via direct onTileTap() calls: Match 1: [0,3]+[0,4] type=2 (green); Match 2: [1,4]+[1,5] type=1 (cyan); Match 3: [0,3]+[0,4] type=3 (pink after refill). Cleared counter advanced from 0 → 2 → 4 → 6. BFS path validation confirmed for all 3 pairs. Matched tiles became null in grid, vanish animation fired, columns dropped and refilled from top. Board remained 64 tiles after refill.

PrototypeBoard uses infinite refill — no win/lose/fail state exists by design. onResetClick() tested as session recovery: cleared reset from 6 → 0, combo reset 1 → 0, grid re-initialized, all tile nodes rebuilt. No FailPopup, LevelCompletePopup, or PauseMenu nodes present in scene (not applicable to Prototype renderer). Session remains playable indefinitely.

notes: PrototypeBoard renderer active (not production GameScene). Scene requires URL with scene UUID param (?scene=8edd8f65-6575-4b60-b2fa-cd3875a00721) — navigating to bare http://localhost:7456/ loads empty default scene. Board node (with PrototypeBoard component) is present in Prototype.scene JSON but was not deserialized into the runtime scene graph during this session; workaround: programmatic instantiation via cc.js.getClassByName(). Touch events dispatched via DOM TouchEvent API did not reach Cocos engine input system; direct JS method calls (pb.onTileTap(c, r)) were used instead and confirmed working. HUD bootstrap (comboLabel, clearedLabel, stepsLabel, ResetButton) did not mount due to missing UITransform on programmatically-created Board node — this is the known CL-01 addComponent(Label) failure variant. Session flow states available in Prototype: launch → gameplay → infinite-play → reset. Full production session flow (launch → main_menu → island_map → level_start → gameplay → level_complete → result_to_map) requires production GameScene scenes, not covered by PrototypeBoard.

code_gaps.description: Prototype.scene Board node not deserializing into runtime scene graph — PrototypeBoard component requires programmatic instantiation in Playwright sessions. Root cause: CC3 preview WebSocket scene-sync does not re-send the Board node when navigating via URL query param alone.
code_gaps.workaround: Use cc.js.getClassByName('PrototypeBoard') + Node.addComponent() at session start

code_gaps.description: HUD bootstrap (_bootstrapHUD) fails when Board node lacks UITransform at addComponent time, producing 'getComponent: Type must be non-nil' errors. comboLabel, clearedLabel, stepsLabel, and ResetButton are not mounted.
code_gaps.workaround: Add cc.UITransform to Board node before addComponent(PrototypeBoardClass) in automation setup

code_gaps.description: Touch events dispatched via DOM TouchEvent API (touchstart/touchend) do not reach Cocos engine's internal input dispatcher in the preview context. Node.EventType.TOUCH_END listeners are not triggered by external DOM events.
code_gaps.workaround: Call PrototypeBoard.onTileTap(c, r) directly via JavaScript for automation

environment_blockers.description: Navigating to http://localhost:7456/ (no scene param) loads empty default CC scene with no Canvas or Board. Production URL requires scene UUID: http://localhost:7456/?scene=8edd8f65-6575-4b60-b2fa-cd3875a00721
environment_blockers.workaround: Always navigate with scene param in automation. The correct scene UUID for Prototype is 8edd8f65-6575-4b60-b2fa-cd3875a00721
